description: Use this API to change the identifier of the specified multi-section line. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = mbidmsl(ibus, jbus, id, idnew)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: One of the endpoint buses connected by the multi-section line. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: Other endpoint bus connected by the multi-section line. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Present multi-section identifier of the multi-section line for which the identifier is to be changed. (input; ‘&1’ by default).

parameters.name: idnew
parameters.description: New identifier to be assigned to the multi-section line. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: multi-section line ID from IBUS to JBUS not found.
multi-section line ID from IBUS to JBUS already exists.
invalid new identifier; must start with &
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
